'''Marmor''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] who [[Corellian/Legends|hailed]] from<ref name="CCG" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Corellia">{{DB|location|corellia|Corellia}}</ref> [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] and lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="CCG" /> He served in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]<ref name="Madine DB" /> but eventually defected to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] along with<ref name="CCG" /> [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] [[Storm commando/Legends|storm commando]] leader<ref name="DB">{{DB|character|generalcrixmadine|Madine, General Crix}}</ref>—and later Rebel [[General/Legends|general]]—[[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]].<ref name="CCG" /> By the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">The ''[[Death Star II Limited]]'' card set takes place primarily during the events of {{Film|VI}}, which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].</ref> Marmor held the rank of [[Corporal/Legends|corporal]] in the Alliance, and he worked as a [[Technician/Legends|dock mechanic]] aboard the [[MC80A Home One Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 ''Home One'' type Star Cruiser]] [[Home One/Legends|''Home One'']]. During his service aboard ''Home One'', Marmor managed a staff of seventy-five [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] and twelve [[Star Cruiser/Legends|Star Cruiser]] mechanics in the rear quadrant of the [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|Cruiser]]. He had fair skin and [[Color/Legends|dark]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]].<ref name="CCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Marmor was introduced in a card for the [[2000]] ''[[Death Star II Limited]]'' expansion set of [[Decipher]]'s [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]],<ref name="CCG" /> simultaneously also being mentioned as a gameplay statistic on the card for another character, [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[s'Too Vees]], released in the same set.<ref name="Vees">{{CCG|set=Death Star II Limited|cardname=Lieutenant s'Too Vees}}</ref>
